zh.lifeSummary: 當Richilde de Clermont於1080年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特時，她的父親Hugh de Clermont50歲，母親Marguerite Roucy35歲。她和Dreux II de Mello至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1146年在她的家鄉享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Richilde de Clermont was born in 1080, in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Hugh de Clermont, was 50 and her mother, Marguerite Roucy, was 35. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Dreux II de Mello. She died in 1146, in her hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richilde de Clermont est née en 1080, à Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Hugh de Clermont, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Roucy, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Dreux II de Mello. Elle est décédée en 1146, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richilde de Clermont 1080 in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Clermont 50 und ihre Mutter Marguerite Roucy 35. Sie hatte mit Dreux II de Mello mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1146 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde de Clermont è nata il nel 1080 nel Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Hugh de Clermont, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Marguerite Roucy, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Dreux II de Mello. Morì nel 1146, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richilde de Clermontが1080年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Hugh de Clermontは50歳，母Marguerite Roucyは35歳であった。彼女はDreux II de Melloとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1146年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richilde de Clermont(이)가 1080년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Clermont(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite Roucy(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Dreux II de Mello(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1146년 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde de Clermont nasceu em 1080, em Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugh de Clermont, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Roucy, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Dreux II de Mello. Ela faleceu em 1146, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richilde de Clermont родилась в 1080 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh de Clermont было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Roucy, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Dreux II de Mello. Она умерла в 1146 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richilde de Clermont nació en 1080, en Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Clermont, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Marguerite Roucy, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Dreux II de Mello. Murió en 1146, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
